_comment: Boundary-set table consumed by scripts/etl-parliament.mjs and scripts/lib/parliament-validate.mjs (boundaryCaveatFor). Each entry's `comparableTo` lists other boundary set IDs where the geographies are close enough that election-to-election comparisons hold up without a boundary-comparability caveat. Empty `comparableTo` = no cross-set comparability without a caveat.

boundarySets.name: 2010 Periodic Review
boundarySets.notes: Last in force for the 2019 General Election. Constituencies drawn by the Boundary Commissions' 2010 Sixth Periodic Review.

boundarySets.name: 2023 Periodic Review
boundarySets.notes: First in force for the 2024 General Election. Constituencies drawn by the Boundary Commissions' 2023 Periodic Review. Parliament approved November 2023.
